overview.minides: The most iconic SUV ever made — now available in diesel, full-electric, and AMG V8. Three variants in India, three differential locks on all of them.
overview.description: The Mercedes-Benz G-Class (W464) facelift is available in India across 3 variants: G 450d AMG Line (3.0L inline-6 diesel, ₹2.90 Cr), G 580 with EQ Technology (fully electric, 4 motors, 116 kWh, ₹3.00 Cr), and AMG G 63 (4.0L V8 biturbo mild-hybrid, ₹3.74 Cr). All three share the iconic boxy silhouette, ladder-frame construction, portal axles, and 3 individually selectable differential locks with 100% locking effect. The 2024 facelift brought a redesigned grille, new front bumper, improved aerodynamics (0.48 Cd), a 12.3-inch dual-screen MBUX cockpit, 64-colour ambient lighting, and Burmester 3D surround sound. The G 580 EV adds G-Turn (360° spin on the spot), G-Steering (lateral movement), G-Crawl (ultra-slow-speed crawl), and a 116 kWh battery for 470 km WLTP range. The AMG G 63 gets a 48V mild-hybrid V8 producing 577 hp, AMG Ride Control+ air suspension, and the AMG Offroad Package Pro.

suspension.front: Double Wishbone, coil springs, shock absorbers
suspension.rear: Rigid Axle, coil springs (ICE) / Air Suspension (G580 / AMG G63)
suspension.additionalTech: 3 selectable differential locks (front / rear / centre) with 100% locking effect; AMG Ride Control+ air suspension on G63; G580 uses 4-motor torque vectoring

steering.type: Recirculating Ball with Electric Power Assist

sharedSpecs.differentialLocks: 3× Individual 100% Diff Locks (Front / Rear / Centre) — all variants

g580-ev-116kwh-587hp.name: G 580 EQ Technology — 4-Motor Electric (116 kWh)
g580-ev-116kwh-587hp.engineType: 4× Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motors (one per wheel)

automatic.torque: 1164 Nm combined (system) / up to 1165 Nm peak

m177-4-0L-v8-577hp.name: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo + 48V MHEV (AMG G 63)

Burmester 13-Speaker Surround Sound

229 mm Ground Clearance | 700 mm Water Wading

variants.name: G 580 with EQ Technology

4-Motor AWD (One Per Wheel) — Per-Wheel Torque Vectoring
